revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bare_URL_image%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{bots|deny=Citation bot}} {{high use|2200}} This template is an inline alternative to {{Tl|Cleanup bare URLs}}, for use ONLY with links to [[:en:Image file format|image files]]. === Usage === Paste this after a bare-URL reference/link to an image file: :{{Tlx|Bare URL image|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} It is best to place the tag {{em|inside}} a citation, just before the closing {{xtag|ref|c}} tag: * http://www.navsource.org/archives/08/0858412.jpg {{tlp|bare URL image|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ** '''Result:''' http://www.navsource.org/archives/08/0858412.jpg {{bare URL image}} {{talkref}} This will still categorize the page for cleanup without cluttering the present paragraph with {{nowrap|"[bare URL image]"}}, and it will also help track down the citation to improve by keeping the cleanup tag in the citation. When doing it this way, the date must be manually entered; it cannot be done with the {{Bare URL image|{{subst:[[:en:Template:DATE|DATE]]}}}} shortcut method, because [[WP:SUBST|template substitution]] does not work inside {{xtag|ref|p}} tags. === Tracking categories === *This template places the article into both of the following categories: **[[:Category:All articles with bare URLs for citations]] — {{PAGESINCATEGORY:All articles with bare URLs for citations}} pages **[[:Category:Articles with bare URLs for citations]] or a dated subcategory thereof, currently ***[[:Category:Articles with bare URLs for citations from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]] — {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles with bare URLs for citations from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} pages **[[:Category:Articles with image file bare URLs for citations]] — {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles with image file bare URLs for citations}} pages {{Purge|''Purge this page to update pages-in-category counts''}} === Why? === See [[WP:Bare URLs]] === How to respond to this tag === See [[WP:HOWCITE]] ==Template Data== {{template data header}} { "params": { "name": {}, "reason": {}, "date": {} } } == See also == * {{Tlx|Bare URL inline}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL PDF}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL AV media}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL DOC}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL plain text}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL spreadsheet}} * {{Tlx|Cleanup bare URLs}} * {{Tlx|Citations broken}} * [[Wikipedia:Link rot]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} { "params": { "name": {}, "reason": {}, "date": {} } } [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
